strategic_objective: Determine the stability and class/time consistency of near-perfect linear dependencies among packet length, segment size, flag counts, and packet count features, and evaluate their potential as shortcut signals affecting model generalization.
key_checks: Measure linear correlation coefficients across classes and time windows
Analyze dependency concentration profiles for involved feature pairs
Test shortcut-like predictive power of individual features in correlated pairs
Check for redundancy impact on feature prioritization
success_criteria: Dependencies are confirmed stable or fluctuating across classes/time
Shortcut-like signals are identified or ruled out for correlated features
Implications for feature redundancy and model robustness are clarified
router_constraints: preserve feature_pair scope for correlated features
